title: Menorca Sant Joan Regatta – Alfonso XIII Trophy
location: De Barcelona al puerto de Maó
description: An ocean sailing crossing of around 140 nautical miles (250 km) from Barcelona to Maó, organised by the Real Club Náutico de Barcelona and the Club Marítim de Maó. The twenty-seventh edition sets sail on 18 June 2026 and concludes with the Port of Maó Race on the 20th, inside the harbour itself.
